catalog_hero_description: Direct connection with artisanal producers who preserve millennia-old traditions. Every sip tells stories of earth, agave, and mastery.

segunda_opcion_process_collection_desc: Careful selection of ripe agave from the mountains of Oaxaca

Conectamos el origen, la tradición y el: We connect the origin, tradition, and talent of our communities with the world.
Mezcal artesanal · Trazabilidad completa: Artisanal Mezcal · Complete traceability · Fair trade · Oaxaca, Mexico
Descubre el auténtico sabor del mezcal,: Discover the authentic taste of mezcal, an artisanal spirit born from the heart of agave.
Elaborado con procesos tradicionales que: Made with traditional processes that respect the earth and time, each bottle holds character and tradition. Its smoky notes and unique nuances make it an unparalleled experience.
El alma de Oaxaca en cada gota: The soul of Oaxaca in every drop
Cada compra transforma vidas y preserva: Every purchase transforms lives and preserves our cultural heritage.
Cada producto trae un código QR único. V: Each product has a unique QR code. You will see the producer, the community, the lot and how much of the price goes back to the craftsman.
Descubre nuestra selección de mezcales,: Discover our selection of mezcals, each with its own story.
Agave silvestre cosechado a mano en su p: Wild agave hand-harvested at its optimal ripeness.
Piñas cocidas en horno cónico de tierra: Piñas roasted in cone-shaped earth oven under volcanic stones.
Machacado con tahona de piedra. Sin ataj: Ground with stone tahona. No industrial shortcuts.
Fermentación natural en tinas de madera: Natural fermentation in wooden vats with wild yeast.
Doble destilación en alambique de cobre: Double distillation in copper alembic by artisanal hands.
Las piñas se cuecen en horno cónico de t: The piñas are roasted in a cone-shaped earth oven for 4 days.
Machacado con tahona de piedra jalada po: Ground with stone tahona pulled by animal.
Fermentación natural en tinas de madera: Natural fermentation in wooden vats with wild yeast.
Doble destilación en alambique de cobre: Double distillation in artisanal copper alembic.
El producto que buscas no existe o no es: The product you are looking for does not exist or is not available at this time.
Verifica que este mezcal es auténtico es: Verify this mezcal is authentic by scanning the QR code. From where it was produced to your hand.
Abre el portal oficial con el botón de a: Open the official portal with the button below or scan the QR code with your phone to see all details: producer, region, origin.
Te mostraremos el costo cuando ingreses: We will show you the cost when you enter your address. We ship throughout the country.
